Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are immediately preceded by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur in cases where SW-Reviewer No Response is later observed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in the most common process variant compared to its frequency in rare variants (frequency = 1)
Metric: the sum of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that result in at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Number of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurring before any SW-Reviewer Declined in the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers relative to the total number of activities in the log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of cases containing SW-AE Assign Reviewers that also contain SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are repeated more than three times in the same case
Metric: the average of the function base > 3 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers out of all reviewer assignment-related activities (including RW-AE Assign Reviewers and RSW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'RW-AE Assign Reviewers' or activity == 'RSW-AE Assign Reviewers'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that are followed within 7 days by a Reviewer Invitation Reminder
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Number of SW-AE Assign Reviewers performed in cases that end with SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"

Name: Frequency of SW-AE Assign Reviewers in variants that include reviewer reminders (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' or activity == 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-AE Assign Reviewers that occur after a deadline-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late' or activity == 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'"}"
